KEY FINDS THIS RUN: (1) HarimxChoi/langgraph-travel-agent (MIT) — BEST travel AI starting point: production LangGraph agent with real Amadeus (flights) + Hotelbeds (hotels) + Twilio + HubSpot. Async parallel orchestration. Fork and extend with client GDS contracts. (2) skarlekar/mcp_travelassistant (MIT) — MCP-native travel suite: separate MCP servers per concern (flights, hotels, weather, budget, events). Native Claude/Cursor integration. First-mover on A2A travel interoperability. (3) Amadeus Python SDK (MIT, amadeus4dev/amadeus-python) — Free tier 2,000 calls/month breaks GDS monopoly. Flight Offers Search + Hotel Search + Points of Interest + Trip Purpose Prediction. Best open access to real travel inventory. (4) GraphHopper (Apache-2.0, ~5.6k stars, graphhopper/graphhopper) — OSM routing engine, Java, REST API. Turn-by-turn navigation, isochrones, map matching. Drop-in for Google Maps Directions. Foundation for ground transport AI. (5) OpenTripPlanner (LGPL-3.0, ~2.2k stars) — Multimodal journey planner: bus + rail + bike + walk. GTFS + OSM. GraphQL API. Used by 30+ country transit agencies. Foundation for AI transit assistants in LATAM (Bogota metro, Sao Paulo, Buenos Aires). (6) tonykipkemboi/trip_planner_agent (MIT, ~350 stars) — CrewAI canonical travel tutorial: 3 role-based agents (city researcher + activity planner + travel advisor). Most forked travel open-source repo in H1 2026. (7) DIDA-AI/Dida-hotel-MCP-CN (MIT) — 2M+ hotels via MCP, no rate limits. Global hotel inventory B2B API wrapped as MCP server. Best hotel MCP for production. (8) QloApps (OSL-3.0, ~1.1k stars, Qloapps/QloApps) — Best open-source hotel PMS + booking engine. PHP/MySQL self-hostable. AI layer: conversational booking + dynamic pricing + upsell agents. 4-6 weeks to WhatsApp AI concierge.
